title: Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners:
Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma South Asia Partners!
